verse_text: he consulted with his leaders and commanders to stop the water from the springs outside the city, and they helped him.

links.context: In addition to cisterns, Hezekiah had a tunnel constructed through hard rock to allow the water of the Gihon spring to flow into the pool of Siloam. Archeologists have discovered Hebrew words carved in the wall of the tunnel, celebrating its completion in the time of Hezekiah's reign as king (see [[2CH.32:2]]-4).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
